scripts.build:database: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/shadow && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/database
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:database && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/shared && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/scoring && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/intelligence && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/discord && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/shadow && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/portfolio && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/execution && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/copy-trading
scripts.test:copy-trading: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/copy-trading && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/copy-trading
scripts.build:worker: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/worker
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/worker && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/web
scripts.build:web: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/shared && npm run build:database && npm run build --workspace=@augurium/web
scripts.test:scoring: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/scoring && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/scoring
scripts.test:intelligence: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/intelligence && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/intelligence
scripts.test:shadow: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/shadow && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/shadow
scripts.test:discord: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/discord && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/discord
scripts.test:portfolio: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/portfolio && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/portfolio
scripts.test:execution: npm run build --workspace=@augurium/execution && npm run test --workspace=@augurium/execution
